arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's makeshift defence faces unique Luton Town challenge with Michael Carrick's faith
arts.sum: Carrick is right, and Boro must take heart from a positive performance on Tuesday. Another win would leave Boro in positive spirits heading into the final international break of the season.

arts.ttl: Luton chief not paying too much attention to Boro drubbing ahead of return clash
arts.sum: Hatters looking to make amends for 5-1 thrashing

arts.sum: Wilson could break the record of Scotland;s youngest ever player if Steve Clarke gives him a run out against Greece

arts.ttl: James Wilson Scotland call-up 'fantastic' for Hearts academy as Neil Critchley lauds unique club achievement
arts.sum: Hearts boss Neil Critchley believes James Wilson's Scotland call-up is "fantastic" for everyone at the football club. It’s fantastic for him and his family, for the academy and the football club.

arts.sum: Town manager preferred to stay silent when asked about Cardiff boss

arts.ttl: Morris a doubt for Luton as Hatters boss faces his toughest selection so far
arts.sum: Striker will be given every chance of making Boro match

arts.ttl: What Michael Carrick says Middlesbrough can't do as he's asked what's required for play-off spot
arts.sum: But wanting to head into the play-offs in a positive mindset if they do manage to make that breakthrough anyway, Carrick just wants his side to focus on one game at a time, and winning as many games as possible with the end goal in mind, without thinking too much about the end goal from week to week. While it can’t be predicted exactly how many points Boro will end up needing in order to finish in the top six this season, many have put a rough figure of around five to six more wins to get them in.

arts.ttl: Football cliche comes to mind as Ryan Giles's Boro return is yet to go to plan
arts.sum: It’s hard not to feel for Ryan Giles right now, as his Middlesbrough return struggles to get going. In hindsight, the decision not to re-sign for Boro that summer was an error, but it’s hard to resent the attack-minded full-back for it.
